title: SIEMBox portable parser
description: A self-contained, declarative parser: match (pattern) + field_mappings (-> canonical) + derivations (data-driven post-processing) + test_samples (self-tests).

name.description: Unique kebab-case parser name (also the upsert key on import).

priority.description: Lower runs first; first matching parser wins. Pick a value that does not collide with existing parsers for the same log shape.

pattern.description: Regex with named groups for regex/grok parsers; ignored (use "") for json parsers.

field_mappings.description: regex: {captureGroup: canonicalField}. json: {jsonKey: canonicalField}. Map to canonical names where possible (source_ip, user, status_code, ...).

derivations.description: Ordered, data-driven post-processing rules (replaces hardcoded engine logic). set/extract fill EMPTY fields unless overwrite:true; first match wins.

when.description: field -> matcher; ALL must match (AND). Omit to always apply.

extract.description: field -> pull a regex capture group out of another field.

overwrite.description: Overwrite existing values (default false = only fill empty).

test_samples.description: Self-tests: each raw input must yield the expected canonical fields. Required for catalog submissions.

input.description: Raw log line (or JSON for json parsers).

expect.description: Canonical field -> expected value. Use null to assert a field is ABSENT.

packet_source_ip.description: Optional syslog sender (actor-IP fallback) for this sample.
